creator: dotGears Studios, Dong Nguyen
description: Flappy Bird v1.0, v1.1, v1.2, and v1.3 for IOS devices. Versions 1.2 and 1.3 include the updated textures. If you wish to experience classic Flappy Bird then v1.1 is the version you are searching for. This archive is technically incomplete as one  version of the five versions are missing: this missing version is identical to v1.0 and has a version declaration of 1.0. The only difference between the missing version and the obtained 2nd v1.0 is the title. In the intial release (the missing one) the game was actually called Flap Flap . Not only does the app name reflect this but also the title screen which actually featured a yellow title rather than the green one that it was changed to in the 2nd v1.0. While this archive doesn't make mention of the missing version in the title this is because the update to the 2nd v1.0 was made in such a short time that it is unlikely this version is ever to be found and is considered at this point to be lost media. If you do have any information regarding the whereabouts or possible whereabouts of this version please contact: universalsoftwarearchive@gmail.com

title: Flappy Bird (IOS All Versions)
